allow: PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-5.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $hardQs = $json | Where-Object { $_.difficulty -eq "hard" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty id; Write-Output "Hard questions \($\($hardQs.Count\)\):"; $hardQs | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ })

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-1.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Count: $\($json.Count\)"; $expected = @\(2,0,3,1,0,3,1,2,3,0,1,2,0,3,1,2,3,0,2,1,0,1,3,2,0,2,1,3,0,1,2,3,1,0,2,3,1,0,2,3,1,0,2,3,0,1,3,2,1,0,3,1,2,0,3,2,1,0,3,2\); $mismatches = @\(\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt $json.Count; $i++\) { $actual = $json[$i].correctAnswers[0]; if \($actual -ne $expected[$i]\) { $mismatches += "Q$\($i+1\): expected $\($expected[$i]\) got $actual" } }; if \($mismatches.Count -eq 0\) { "All 60 answer positions match the required key." } else { $mismatches })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-4.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Count: $\($j.Count\)"; "Positions: $\(\($j | ForEach-Object { $_.correctAnswers[0] }\) -join ','\)"; $expected = "2,0,3,1,0,3,1,2,3,0,1,2,0,3,1,2,3,0,2,1,0,1,3,2,0,2,1,3,0,1,2,3,1,0,2,3,1,0,2,3,1,0,2,3,0,1,3,2,1,0,3,1,2,0,3,2,1,0,3,2"; $actual = \($j | ForEach-Object { $_.correctAnswers[0] }\) -join ','; "Match expected: $\($actual -eq $expected\)"; $diffs = @{}; $j | ForEach-Object { $d = $_.difficulty; if \($diffs.ContainsKey\($d\)\) { $diffs[$d]++ } else { $diffs[$d] = 1 } }; "Difficulty: easy=$\($diffs['easy']\) medium=$\($diffs['medium']\) hard=$\($diffs['hard']\)")

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-5.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $longestList = @\(\); foreach \($q in $json\) { $lengths = $q.options | ForEach-Object { $_.Length }; $maxLen = \($lengths | Measure-Object -Maximum\).Maximum; $correctIdx = $q.correctAnswers[0]; $correctLen = $lengths[$correctIdx]; $secondLongest = \($lengths | Sort-Object -Descending\)[1]; if \($correctLen -eq $maxLen\) { $gap = $correctLen - $secondLongest; $longestList += [PSCustomObject]@{ id=$q.id; correctLen=$correctLen; secondLen=$secondLongest; gap=$gap } } }; Write-Output "Questions where correct is longest, ordered by largest gap from 2nd longest:"; $longestList | Sort-Object gap -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-1.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Easy questions:"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $json.Count; $i++\) { if \($json[$i].difficulty -eq 'easy'\) { "  Q$\($i+1\): $\($json[$i].id\)" } }; ""; "Hard questions:"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $json.Count; $i++\) { if \($json[$i].difficulty -eq 'hard'\) { "  Q$\($i+1\): $\($json[$i].id\)" } })

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-1.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Count: $\($json.Count\)"; "Difficulty distribution:"; $json | Group-Object difficulty | ForEach-Object { "  $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" }; "Position distribution:"; $json | ForEach-Object { $_.correctAnswers[0] } | Group-Object | Sort-Object Name | ForEach-Object { "  index $\($_.Name\): $\($_.Count\)" })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-4.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Count: $\($j.Count\)"; $expected = "2,0,3,1,0,3,1,2,3,0,1,2,0,3,1,2,3,0,2,1,0,1,3,2,0,2,1,3,0,1,2,3,1,0,2,3,1,0,2,3,1,0,2,3,0,1,3,2,1,0,3,1,2,0,3,2,1,0,3,2"; $actual = \($j | ForEach-Object { $_.correctAnswers[0] }\) -join ','; "Positions match: $\($actual -eq $expected\)"; $diffs = @{}; $j | ForEach-Object { $d = $_.difficulty; if \($diffs.ContainsKey\($d\)\) { $diffs[$d]++ } else { $diffs[$d] = 1 } }; "Difficulty: easy=$\($diffs['easy']\) medium=$\($diffs['medium']\) hard=$\($diffs['hard']\)"; "Hard questions:"; for \($i=0; $i -lt 60; $i++\) { if \($j[$i].difficulty -eq 'hard'\) { "  Q$\($i+1\): $\($j[$i].id\)" } }; "Easy questions:"; for \($i=0; $i -lt 60; $i++\) { if \($j[$i].difficulty -eq 'easy'\) { "  Q$\($i+1\): $\($j[$i].id\)" } })

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-1.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $allLens = @\(\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt $json.Count; $i++\) { foreach \($opt in $json[$i].options\) { $allLens += $opt.Length } }; "Min: $\(\($allLens | Measure-Object -Minimum\).Minimum\)"; "Max: $\(\($allLens | Measure-Object -Maximum\).Maximum\)"; "Avg: $\([math]::Round\(\($allLens | Measure-Object -Average\).Average, 1\)\)"; "Count >180: $\(\(\($allLens | Where-Object { $_ -gt 180 }\)\).Count\)"; "Count >200: $\(\(\($allLens | Where-Object { $_ -gt 200 }\)\).Count\)"; "Count <90: $\(\(\($allLens | Where-Object { $_ -lt 90 }\)\).Count\)")

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-4.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "Count: $\($j.Count\)"; $expected = "2,0,3,1,0,3,1,2,3,0,1,2,0,3,1,2,3,0,2,1,0,1,3,2,0,2,1,3,0,1,2,3,1,0,2,3,1,0,2,3,1,0,2,3,0,1,3,2,1,0,3,1,2,0,3,2,1,0,3,2"; $actual = \($j | ForEach-Object { $_.correctAnswers[0] }\) -join ','; "Positions match: $\($actual -eq $expected\)"; $posDist = @{0=0;1=0;2=0;3=0}; $j | ForEach-Object { $posDist[$_.correctAnswers[0]]++ }; "Position distribution: A\(0\)=$\($posDist[0]\) B\(1\)=$\($posDist[1]\) C\(2\)=$\($posDist[2]\) D\(3\)=$\($posDist[3]\)"; $diffs = @{}; $j | ForEach-Object { $d = $_.difficulty; if \($diffs.ContainsKey\($d\)\) { $diffs[$d]++ } else { $diffs[$d] = 1 } }; "Difficulty: easy=$\($diffs['easy']\) medium=$\($diffs['medium']\) hard=$\($diffs['hard']\)"; "Total: $\($diffs['easy'] + $diffs['medium'] + $diffs['hard']\)")

PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\T768408\\Documents\\claude projects\\certPrep\\src\\data\\questions\\gcp-pcde-batch-1.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $worst = @\(\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt $json.Count; $i++\) { $lens = $json[$i].options | ForEach-Object { $_.Length }; $correctIdx = $json[$i].correctAnswers[0]; $correctLen = $lens[$correctIdx]; $maxOther = \($lens | Where-Object { $_ -ne $correctLen } | Measure-Object -Maximum\).Maximum; if \($correctLen -eq \($lens | Measure-Object -Maximum\).Maximum -and \($correctLen - $maxOther\) -ge 10\) { $worst += [PSCustomObject]@{Q=\($i+1\); diff=\($correctLen - $maxOther\); correctLen=$correctLen; maxOther=$maxOther} } }; "Questions where correct is longest by 10+ chars: $\($worst.Count\)"; $worst | Sort-Object diff -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 | Format-Table)
